title: Monetise Substack Ecosystem Map
description: This document serves as a comprehensive map of all URLs, products, price points, freebies, and backend configurations active on the `https://www.monetisesubstack.com` domain.

items.name: Build to Profit Live Workshop
items.description: The flagship live workshop offering, teaching foundational monetization strategies.

items.name: The $10k Launch Lab
items.description: A higher-tier workshop focused on consistent 10k launches.

items.name: The Money Map
items.description: A complete strategy course covering ICP, offer, positioning, segmentation, messaging, and copy. Note: Currently, the root domain `/` is set in `src/app/page.tsx` to automatically redirect traffic to `/10k-launch-lab`.
items.callout: Sold as $300 Bump on Build to Profit

items.name: How to Hit 10k Workshop
items.description: A lower barrier-to-entry challenge or mini-workshop.

items.name: 100 Genius Launch Ideas
items.description: A digital product detailing successful launch ideas and frameworks.

items.name: First 100 Paid Subscribers
items.description: A comprehensive framework to convert free readers into paying customers and achieve bestseller status.

items.name: Unstuck to Published
items.description: A 60-minute live workshop (with Jessica Best) for Substack creators who are stuck overthinking — walk out with a positioned publication, a structured first article, and a paywall strategy that converts.

items.name: Build Your Substack
items.description: A workshop helping creators build and launch their Substack publication from scratch. Reuses the same checkout architecture and order bump structure as Unstuck to Published.

items.name: Creator Bundle
items.description: A bundled product offering with a Launch Stack order bump. Standalone checkout with its own lead table.

items.name: The Offer Clarity Sprint
items.description: A self-paced course that teaches creators how to package expertise into a clear, one-sentence offer that subscribers buy from a single email. Embedded Stripe Elements checkout with 3 individual order bumps + a discounted bundle, followed by a 1:1 coaching upsell.

items.name: Your First $1K After Corporate
items.description: A 60-minute live workshop teaching corporate professionals the exact 90-day system to make their first $1,000 online. Uses a direct Stripe Payment Link (no embedded checkout). Scheduled for March 31st.
items.callout: Checkout via Stripe Payment Link — no backend API routes or database table

sections.title: AI Software & Custom Tools (Freebies & Paid Add-ons)

apps.name: Show Don't Tell - Viral Thumbnail Generator
apps.description: A custom-coded AI agent connecting to Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image) to dynamically generate scroll-stopping brand thumbnails. Protected by a `TokenID` access model.

apps.name: Ana Ai Offer Flow
apps.description: An interactive AI tool designed to clarify and flow out product offerings.

apps.name: Ana Offer Genius
apps.description: An AI-powered builder that helps users craft high-converting offers.
apps.access: Initially internal/gated; sold as an Order Bump on various funnels (usually **$27 - $37** value).

apps.name: Viral Digital Product Builder (VDPB)
apps.description: An interactive builder for creating high-converting viral digital product ideas, names, and copy briefs.

apps.name: The Launch Stack
apps.description: A comprehensive launch project management tool or dashboard.
apps.access: Password Protected (Requires the master password `mellon_hwg`, defined in `.env.local`). Also sold as an Order Bump (usually **$67 - $69** value).

apps.name: Ana's Viral Digital Product Finder
apps.description: A free AI-powered tool (Gemini 3 Flash with thinking) that generates hyper-specific viral digital product ideas based on the user's accomplishments, passions, and profession. Includes tabbed route selection, concept cards with pricing and title ideas, and an upsell flow to the 10K Launch Lab.

apps.name: Will It Sell? - AI Product Scoring Tool
apps.description: A free AI-powered tool (Gemini 3 Flash with thinking) that scores digital product ideas against Ana Calin's Viral Product Formula. Returns a weighted scorecard with 9 per-criterion scores, overall score, verdict, and actionable improvements. Funnels into the 10K Launch Lab.

items.name: HWG Command Centre (Admin Dashboard)
items.description: Central command center for real-time revenue tracking, multi-table lead management, abandoned cart recovery, and Kit synchronization.

table.name: Hooks That Stop the Scroll
table.details: A vault of high-converting headline frameworks and opening loops designed to capture attention instantly.

table.name: The 60-Minute Launch Calendar
table.details: The exact day-by-day Notion templates used to manage 6-figure launches without burnout.

table.name: CUSTOM CODED: OfferGenius™ AI Builder
table.details: A custom AI tool that automatically perfectly customizes an offer for a specific audience to eliminate checkout hesitation.

table.name: CUSTOM TRAINED: 'Lazy Launch' AI EMAIL WRITER
table.details: A custom-trained AI system pre-loaded with psychological email sequences designed to sell without sounding "salesy".

table.name: The Money Map Bundle
table.details: Bundles the entry-level live workshop with the comprehensive 'Money Map' strategy course normally valued at $497.

table.name: 1:1 Sales Coaching Session
table.details: A direct, high-touch 1:1 strategy and group coaching add-on to maximize the impact of the launch templates.

table.name: Show Don't Tell Thumbnail Generator (400 Credits)
table.offeredOn: Unstuck to Published, Build Your Substack
table.details: Adds 400 image credits (~200 generations) to the Show Don't Tell AI Thumbnail Generator. 19 style presets, 1 year access. Credits are provisioned into the `show_dont_tell_users` table on payment confirmation.

table.name: 100 Genius Launch Ideas PDF
table.offeredOn: Unstuck to Published, Build Your Substack
table.details: 100 vetted, high-converting launch ideas sorted by difficulty and revenue potential. Instant PDF download with lifetime access.

table.name: Hooks That Stop the Scroll
table.offeredOn: Unstuck to Published, Build Your Substack
table.details: Vault of high-converting headline frameworks and opening loops that force readers to stop scrolling and click.

table.name: The Creator Launch Kit (Bundle)
table.offeredOn: Unstuck to Published, Build Your Substack
table.details: All 3 add-ons bundled: Show Don't Tell (400 credits) + 100 Genius Launch Ideas PDF + Hooks That Stop the Scroll. Individual total $101, bundle price $69 (save $32).

table.name: The Launch Stack
table.details: The comprehensive launch project management tool added as an order bump on the Creator Bundle checkout.

table.name: The Launch Stack
table.details: Password-gated launch project management tool. Password (`mellon_hwg`) revealed on success page after purchase.

table.name: Hooks That Stop the Scroll
table.details: Vault of high-converting headline frameworks and opening loops.

table.name: Offer Genius
table.details: AI-powered offer builder. Password-gated tool unlocked on success page (uses same `mellon_hwg` master password as Launch Stack).

table.name: Offer Clarity Bump Bundle (All 3)
table.details: Auto-calculated bundle: sum of Launch Stack + Hooks + Offer Genius minus a configurable discount percentage. When selected, individual bumps are disabled. Optional explicit override available.

table.name: 1:1 Coaching with Ana
table.details: Post-purchase one-click upsell using saved card (off-session charge via `setup_future_usage: off_session`). Reduced from $997 retail. Falls back to Stripe Elements form if no saved payment method.

sections.title: Success & Thank You Pages (Fulfillment)
sections.description: These pages handle the post-purchase experience, dynamic rendering of purchased bumps, and direct access links.

items.name: General Build to Profit Success
items.redirect: Displays a 3-second countdown before automatically redirecting the user to a Google Doc containing instructions to join a private Substack community.
items.content: Confirms the order, details next steps (check email, calendar reminders), and lists bonuses (Resource Pack, Recordings).

items.name: 10k Launch Lab Success
items.content: Welcomes users to the 10k Launch Lab. Instructs them to check email and start Day 1 immediately.
dynamicRendering: If Upsell bought: Displays a block to book the 1:1 Coaching session via a `calendly.com/anacalin/30min` link.
If Bump 1 bought: Instructs the user to access "Hooks That Stop the Scroll" in their dashboard.
If Bump 2 bought: Instructs the user to view their Notion "60-Minute Launch Calendar" templates.

items.name: How to Hit 10k Success
items.content: Welcomes users to the "Hit Your First $10,000 Month" course. Gives a direct link to a YouTube video.
dynamicRendering: If Bump bought: Unlocks a high-visibility block for "Hooks That Stop the Scroll!" linking directly to a public Notion page (`anabubolea.notion.site/Hooks-That-Stop...`).

items.name: 100 Genius Ideas Success
items.content: Highlights an urgent "Do Not Close This Page" banner. Provides a direct local download link to the `100-Genius-Offers-Sell-2026.pdf` file.
dynamicRendering: If Bump 1 bought: Shows the OfferGenius block with a direct link to the `/ana-offer-genius` protected app.
If Bump 2 bought: Shows the Launch Stack block, revealing the password (`mellon_hwg`) required to access `/launch-stack` and links directly to it.

items.name: Show Don't Tell Success
items.content: A secure page that extracts the newly created programmatic `token_id` from the Stripe redirect URL (e.g. `SDT-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) and displays it in large text.
items.features: Provides a one-click "Copy to Clipboard" button and directs the user to immediately go to `/show-dont-tell` to login with their token.

items.name: First 100 Subscribers Success
items.content: Confirms the order, verifies the purchase, and instructs the user to check their email for immediate access to the workshop and bonuses.

items.name: Unstuck to Published Success
items.content: Confirms the Unstuck to Published purchase and provides next steps including email confirmation and workshop access.
dynamicRendering: If SDT Bump bought: Provisions 400 credits into Show Don't Tell and displays token/access info.
If Genius Ideas Bump bought: Provides download link for 100 Genius Launch Ideas PDF.
If Hooks Bump bought: Provides access to Hooks That Stop the Scroll vault.
If Bundle bought: Shows all three bonus access blocks.

items.name: Build Your Substack Success
items.content: Confirms the Build Your Substack purchase and provides next steps. Uses same bump rendering logic as Unstuck to Published.
dynamicRendering: If SDT Bump bought: Provisions 400 credits into Show Don't Tell and displays token/access info.
If Genius Ideas Bump bought: Provides download link for 100 Genius Launch Ideas PDF.
If Hooks Bump bought: Provides access to Hooks That Stop the Scroll vault.
If Bundle bought: Shows all three bonus access blocks.

items.name: Creator Bundle Success
items.content: Confirms the Creator Bundle purchase and provides access to all bundled resources.
dynamicRendering: If Launch Stack Bump bought: Reveals the Launch Stack password and direct link to `/launch-stack`.

items.name: Offer Clarity Sprint Success
items.content: Welcomes the buyer with a green-accented heading. Renders one DeliveryCard per product purchased and fires Facebook Pixel `Purchase` + GA `purchase` events.
dynamicRendering: Always: Course access card for the Offer Clarity Sprint.
If Launch Stack Bump bought: PasswordReveal card showing `mellon_hwg` (from `NEXT_PUBLIC_LAUNCH_STACK_PASSWORD`) with copy-to-clipboard, plus link to `/launch-stack`.
If Hooks Bump bought: Access link to the Hooks That Stop the Scroll vault.
If Offer Genius Bump bought: PasswordReveal card with `mellon_hwg` and link to `/ana-offer-genius`.
If Bundle bought: All three bump cards above are rendered.
If 1:1 Coaching upsell accepted: Calendly booking card.

items.name: Offer Clarity Coaching Upsell
items.content: Post-checkout one-click upsell page for 1:1 coaching with Ana at $797 (struck-through retail $997, with emerald 'Save $200' badge). Heading uses the same emerald green as the announcement bar. Uses saved card off-session charge; falls back to embedded Stripe Elements if no payment method on file.
items.redirect: On success or skip, forwards to `/offer-clarity-success?leadId=...`.

sections.title: Backend Infrastructure Overview (API Ecosystem)
sections.description: These APIs run silently in the background routing traffic and managing state:

apis.description: Manages lead collection for `/join` funnel.

Listens for successful Stripe `checkout.session.completed` AND `payment_intent.succeeded` events. The `payment_intent.succeeded` branch routes by `metadata.product` / `metadata.funnel` across 7 product keys (`offer_clarity_sprint`, `offer_clarity_coaching_upsell`, `hit10k_workshop`, `10k_launch_lab`, `first100_workshop`, `first100_from_wim_upsell`, `100_genius_ideas`) as a safety net in case the client-side confirm-payment call drops. Idempotent.
Creates Stripe checkout sessions for the Build to Profit funnel.
Creates Stripe checkout sessions for the Thumbnail Generator credit packages.
Validates Token IDs and returns credit usage.
Manages credit deduction and invokes Google's Gemini SDK for thumbnail building.
Routes `launch-lab`, `hit10k`, `genius-ideas`, `first100`, `unstuck`, `build-your-substack`, and `creator-bundle` native Stripe Elements form transactions.
Confirms Stripe payments and fulfills orders for all embedded checkout products. Updates lead status and provisions bump purchases.
Checks payment and lead status for `launch-lab`, `hit10k`, `genius-ideas`, `unstuck`, `build-your-substack`, and `creator-bundle`.
Manages waitlist signups for the 10k Launch Lab.
Handles acceptance of 1:1 coaching upsell after Launch Lab purchase.
Confirms the upsell payment for 1:1 coaching.
Manages waitlist signups for How to Hit 10k.
Password verification for the Admin Command Centre dashboard.
Password verification for the Viral Digital Product Builder.
AI-powered offer matching endpoint for the Ana Offer Genius tool.
Aggregates complex sales, lead, and abandonment data across all funnels for real-time reporting.
A dynamic explorer providing live row counts and definitions for the Supabase schema.
Synchronizes filtered user segments directly into the Kit (ConvertKit) mailing infrastructure with tagging.
Manages and creates Kit tags directly from the Command Centre.
Creates Stripe PaymentIntents and pending leads for the First 100 Subscribers native checkout.
Confirms Stripe payments and fulfills the First 100 Subscribers checkout process.
Creates Stripe PaymentIntents and pending leads for the Unstuck to Published checkout. Supports optional SDT order bump (+$47).
Confirms Stripe payments for Unstuck to Published. If SDT bump purchased, provisions 400 credits into `show_dont_tell_users` (tops up existing accounts or creates new token).

Accepts accomplishments, passions, and profession via POST. Uses Gemini 3 Flash (with thinking, budget 8192) to generate viral digital product ideas organized into route buckets with concepts, pricing, titles, and market research.

Accepts a product idea, optional price, and optional niche via POST. Uses Gemini 3 Flash (with thinking, budget 8192) to score the idea against Ana's Viral Product Formula across 9 weighted criteria. Returns overall score, verdict, per-criterion breakdown, and actionable improvements.

Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent (with `setup_future_usage: 'off_session'` so the card is reusable for the coaching upsell), get-or-creates the Stripe customer, computes total with bundle short-circuit (bundle covers all 3 individual bumps), and inserts a pending lead row into `offer_clarity_leads`.
Confirms the Offer Clarity payment, marks the lead `is_paid: true`, and persists which bumps were purchased (Launch Stack, Hooks, Offer Genius, or Bundle).
Returns lead and payment status for the Offer Clarity Sprint (used by the success page to render the right delivery cards).

One-click off-session charge against the saved card for the $797 coaching upsell. Falls back to a fresh Elements collection if no card is on file. Updates the existing `offer_clarity_leads` row with the upsell amount.

tables.name: leads
tables.description: Primary lead capture table for general site traffic.

tables.name: leads_bootcamp_brands
tables.description: Stores data for the Build to profit workshop.

tables.name: launch_lab_leads
tables.description: Stores data and order bumps for the 10k Launch Lab.

tables.name: hit10k_leads
tables.description: Stores data for the How to Hit 10k Challenge.

tables.name: genius_ideas_leads
tables.description: Stores data for the 100 Genius Ideas funnel.

tables.name: show_dont_tell_users
tables.description: Manages tokens, expiration dates, and credits for the Thumbnail Generator.

tables.name: ana_ai_leads
tables.description: Stores leads and usage data for the free Ana AI Offer Flow tool.

tables.name: first100_leads
tables.description: Stores data and payment status for the First 100 Paid Subscribers funnel.

tables.name: unstuck_leads
tables.description: Stores leads, payment data, and order bump selections for Unstuck to Published.

tables.name: build_your_substack_leads
tables.description: Stores leads, payment data, and order bump selections for Build Your Substack. Mirrors the unstuck_leads structure.

tables.name: creator_bundle_leads
tables.description: Stores leads, payment data, and Launch Stack bump selection for the Creator Bundle.

tables.name: offer_clarity_leads
tables.description: Stores leads, all 3 bump flags (Launch Stack, Hooks, Offer Genius) + bundle flag, coaching upsell flag, payment lifecycle, pricing snapshot in cents (`base_price_cents`, `bumps_price_cents`, `coaching_price_cents`, `total_paid_cents`), and marketing attribution (utm_*, referrer_url, user_agent, ip_address) for the Offer Clarity Sprint funnel.

items.name: Facebook (Meta) Pixel
items.description: Tracks page views and triggers 'Lead' or 'Purchase' events across all active funnels.

items.name: Rewardful Affiliate Tracking
items.description: Tracks affiliate referrals and confirms conversions on the `/success` page.

items.name: UseProof
items.description: Provides social proof popups across the site (dynamically injected via `cdn.useproof.com`).

sections.title: Funnel Architecture & Pricing Map
sections.description: Complete mapping of every sales funnel with core products, order bumps, bundle options, and upsells. Use this to design new funnels that follow proven patterns.

orderBumps.name: Hooks That Stop the Scroll
orderBumps.description: Vault of high-converting headline frameworks and opening loops

orderBumps.name: The 60-Minute Launch Calendar
orderBumps.description: Day-by-day Notion templates for managing launches

coreProduct.name: 100 Genius Launch Ideas
coreProduct.type: PDF resource vault (100 pre-validated offer templates)

orderBumps.name: OfferGenius AI Builder
orderBumps.description: AI tool that customizes offers for specific audiences

orderBumps.name: Lazy Launch AI Email Writer (Launch Stack)
100 Genius Launch Ideas PDF
orderBumps.description: 100 vetted, high-converting launch ideas sorted by difficulty and revenue potential

upsells.name: 10K Launch Lab (Post-Checkout Redirect)
upsells.description: Redirects to 10K Launch Lab upsell after checkout

orderBumps.name: Show Don't Tell (400 Credits)
orderBumps.description: 400 image credits (~200 generations) for thumbnail generator

orderBumps.name: Hooks That Stop the Scroll
orderBumps.description: Vault of high-converting headline frameworks and opening loops

bundleOption.name: All 3 Bumps Bundle
bundleOption.note: Bundle price = sum of 3 individual bumps × (1 − discount_pct). Optional explicit override via `NEXT_PUBLIC_OFFER_CLARITY_BUMP_BUNDLE_PRICE`. Selecting bundle disables individuals.

upsells.name: 1:1 Coaching with Ana
upsells.description: Post-checkout one-click upsell using saved card (off-session)

funnels.name: Your First $1K After Corporate Funnel
funnels.note: Simple funnel — direct Stripe Payment Link, no embedded checkout, no bumps/upsells

orderBumps.name: The Money Map Bundle
orderBumps.description: Adds the comprehensive Money Map strategy course (normally $497) to the workshop

reusableProducts.description: Products that appear as order bumps across multiple funnels. These are the building blocks for designing new funnels.

funnelTemplate.description: Standard funnel structure to follow when building new funnels.
structure: 2. Order Bump 1 ($17-$47) → low-friction add-on at checkout
5. Bundle Option ($69-$97) → all bumps at a discount (save 30-50%)

sections.title: Environment Variables & Core Services
sections.description: Every production deployment relies on the following backend services and environment variables (defined in `.env.local`):

vars.description: Base API route.
Client-side query key.
Server-side admin key for backend webhooks.
Mounts Stripe Elements on frontend checkouts.
Server-side key for creating PaymentIntents and Sessions.
Validates webhook authenticity to fulfill products safely.
Invokes the `gemini-2.5-flash` environment for the "Show Don't Tell" thumbnail generator.
Secret key for authenticating with the Kit (ConvertKit) V4 API.
Base endpoint for Kit API services (Defaults to `api.kit.com/v4/`).
Protects the central Command Centre dashboard.
Protects the Viral Digital Product Builder tool.
Protects the legacy Launch Stack dashboard.
Base price for the Offer Clarity Sprint course (cents). Default 9700 = $97.
Launch Stack order bump price (cents). Default 6700 = $67.
Hooks That Stop the Scroll order bump price (cents). Default 4700 = $47.
Offer Genius order bump price (cents). Default 3700 = $37.
Discount percentage for the all-3 bundle (0–1). Default 0.20 (20% off).
Optional explicit override for the bundle price (cents). When unset, computed as sum × (1 − discount_pct).
1:1 coaching upsell price (cents). Default 79700 = $797.
Strikethrough retail price for the coaching upsell (cents). Default 99700 = $997.
Master password (`mellon_hwg`) revealed on the Offer Clarity success page for Launch Stack and Offer Genius access.
Teachable (or equivalent) course access URL surfaced on the success page.
Calendly URL for booking the 1:1 coaching session after the upsell is accepted.
Used for redirect URLs, webhooks, and SEO metadata.
